hf021adb3gd908g4689g8a07gc560468572bc: Tell me, Gale: what is your interest in the Astral Plane?
h82a8c318g0203g41cfgb624g97bd5d2081cb: Time. Or rather: the absence of it. In the Astral Plane, everything is eternal.
ha718862cgb94dg4aa3gba25g8ad1b0fa1f9e: It will be my home soon enough, should Vlaakith will it.
